## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest --cov=kube_sentinel` passes (coverage ≥ 85%)
- [ ] `bandit -r src` is clean
- [ ] New/changed rules have positive and negative tests
- [ ] `examples/hardened` still scans clean
